ticket.subject: Batoony Rocks cases to be discussed internally with Team
ticket.raw_subject: Batoony Rocks cases to be discussed internally with Team
ticket.description:
L3: https://pluginhive.slack.com/archives/C02E15X8X0C/p1775803826197099

Shopify MCSL customer **Batoony Rocks** (batoony-rocks.myshopify.com) has shared a concern about Order ID printed on the Amazon labels over Whatsapp.
His concern is -

_**We are having lot of challenge reading the invoice ID here - which is basically the Order ID**_
_**Due to the small font size of the label - they are not able to read the number properly - because of this, labels are getting wrongly put on orders, leading to mixed deliveries.**_
_**Please treat this issue as critical - as this is a MAJOR concern for us - to the point that we may need to find alternative solution if we are unable to address this issue.**_
_**Sometimes the number like 6 and 8 are hard to make out as well.**_

He is asking us to make the INVOICE ID font bigger on the label. Attached a label for reference here.
This was shared earlier by the customer as well and the input from team was that this is directly via Amazon API and we cannot change it.
As customer is complaining and saying that this is a MAJOR concern for him up to the point that he may look for a different solution, could you please check again and if needed to consult with Amazon team to check if changes can be made for this case?
Screenshot of the complete conversation from Whatsapp attached here for reference.
I have discussed the case with Keerthi before posting it here for further input.

URL - batoony-rocks.myshopify.com
Account ID - 5cb8e743-3074-4944-a6e9-e1b2c72715c2
